references.title: A genetic algorithm approach for group formation in collaborative learning considering multiple student characteristics

annotations.text: The paper proposes a way of assembling intra-heterogenous and inter-homogenous groups for collaborative learning. The approach, using a Genetic Algorithm, was tested on a sample of 135 students (each student being represented as part of 3 features). Comparison against other methods of group formation shows not only computational feasibility but also improved student outcomes.
